backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the 'unpublish/placeholder page' feature to its implementing files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing design and functional changes made to the Luminia Group site.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens) for the shadcn-ui design system.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app, setting the page title to 'Luminia Group' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders only the PlaceholderPage while keeping all original site components commented out for easy re-publishing.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with scroll-animated columns displaying the Luminia Group brand, portfolio list, and contact/social links.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, multi-layer overlays, fluid typography, animated entrance transitions, and a scroll-to-empire CTA.
frontend/src/components/ManifestoSection: Scroll-animated manifesto/vision section with a large display quote, gold dividers, and a subtle radial background glow.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-blur effect, desktop nav links with underline hover animations, and a mobile hamburger menu with smooth open/close transitions.
A 'Coming Soon' full-screen placeholder page for Luminia Group with fade-in animation, gold decorative accents, and a footer attribution link.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryDetail: A modal dialog that displays detailed information about a selected subsidiary, supporting keyboard navigation (arrow keys/Escape) and animated transitions between entries.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryGrid.t: Defines the list of seven Luminia subsidiaries and renders them in a grid section with scroll animations, opening a SubsidiaryDetails modal on selection.
frontend/src/components/WelcomePopup.tsx: A full-screen welcome modal shown once per session (via sessionStorage) with animated entrance/exit, corner accents, and a dismiss button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder module indicating no backend queries are needed for this static corporate website.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: A generic React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when a referenced element enters the viewport, returning a visibility flag for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining a dark luxury theme with oklch color tokens (gold, obsidian, ivory), Tailwind base/components/utilities imports, and custom utility classes for glows, gradients, and typography using Cormorant Garamond and Montserrat fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with luxury color tokens (gold, obsidian, ivory, charcoal), custom display font sizes, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Luminia Group app, recording that the existing feature is replacing the live site with a branded 'Coming Soon' placeholder page indicating temporary unavailability.
